channel.title: StatNet for Julia
channel.description: A Julia ecosystem implementing a selection of families of models for the statistical analysis of networks.

item.title: 0.2.0 across the ecosystem: consolidated release notes
item.description: Every package now ships a Keep-a-Changelog CHANGELOG.md with its 0.2.0 (unreleased) section. One page collecting the links, the ecosystem-wide changes, and every breaking change with its migration hint.

item.title: Feature-surface completion, naming harmonization, and a polish sprint
item.description: The P2 sprint lands: the remaining statnet/relevent/RSiena feature gaps closed, standardized fit_<model> entry points with a shared result presentation, numerical and performance fixes across the stack, and cleaner installs.

item.title: Ecosystem-wide correctness pass and R validation
item.description: All packages received a coordinated correctness pass, with estimators rebuilt where needed and results validated against the R reference implementations (ergm, sna, ergm.rank, RSiena).
